events.label: assistant
events.text: Wrote the compliance assessment to `/app/answer.json`. Bottom line: **fail, high risk** — hot work performed outside the authorized permit scope means fire watch, combustible clearance, and precautions per NFPA 51B and OSHA 1926 Subpart J can't be verified for the actual work area/task, creating an uncontrolled fire hazard. Work must stop until a new/amended permit is issued and the area is re-inspected.
